results.name: COADM1A
results.content:
COADM1A DFHMDI COLUMN=1,                                               -
               LINE=1,                                                 -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT),                                      -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(4,35),                                             -
               INITIAL='Admin Menu'
OPTN001 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(6,20),                                             -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN002 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(7,20),                                             -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN003 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(8,20),                                             -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN004 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(9,20),                                             -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN005 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(10,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN006 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(11,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN007 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(12,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN008 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(13,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN009 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(14,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN010 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(15,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN011 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(16,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
OPTN012 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(17,20),                                            -
               INITIAL=' '
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT),                                      -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=25,                                              -
               POS=(20,15),                                            -
               INITIAL='Please select an option :'
OPTION  DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,NUM,UNPROT),                        -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               JUSTIFY=(RIGHT,ZERO),                                   -
               LENGTH=2,                                               -
               POS=(20,41)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(20,44)
ERRMSG  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT,FSET),                                 -
               COLOR=RED,                                              -
               LENGTH=78,                                              -
               POS=(23,1)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=23,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Continue  F3=Exit'
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
        END
*
* Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-70-g193b394-123 Date: 2022-08-22 17:02:42 CDT
*

results.name: COUSR1A
results.content:
COUSR1A DFHMDI COLUMN=1,                                               -
               LINE=1,                                                 -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT),                                      -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=9,                                               -
               POS=(4,35),                                             -
               INITIAL='Add User'
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(8,6),                                              -
               INITIAL='First Name:'
FNAME   DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(8,18)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(8,39)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(8,45),                                             -
               INITIAL='Last Name:'
LNAME   DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(8,56)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(8,77)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(11,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='User ID:'
USERID  DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(11,15)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(11,24),                                            -
               INITIAL='(8 Char)'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=9,                                               -
               POS=(11,45),                                            -
               INITIAL='Password:'
PASSWD  DFHMDF ATTRB=(DRK,FSET,UNPROT),                                -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(11,55)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(11,64),                                            -
               INITIAL='(8 Char)'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(14,6),                                             -
               INITIAL='User Type: '
USRTYPE DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(14,17)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=17,                                              -
               POS=(14,19),                                            -
               INITIAL='(A=Admin, U=User)'
ERRMSG  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT,FSET),                                 -
               COLOR=RED,                                              -
               LENGTH=78,                                              -
               POS=(23,1)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=43,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Add User  F3=Back  F4=Clear  F12=Exit'
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
        END
*
* Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-70-g193b394-123 Date: 2022-08-22 17:02:44 CDT
*
